2606.27163.title: Learning to Fold: prizewinning solution at LeHome Challenge 2026 (1st place online, 2nd offline)
2606.27163.paper_summary: I describe my solution to the LeHome Challenge 2026, an ICRA 2026 competition on bimanual garment folding. The system placed 1st of 62 teams in the online (simulation) round and 2nd in the real-world final. It improves a vision-language-action (VLA) policy with a reinforcement-learning loop. The policy is its own value function: the same network that predicts actions also predicts success, progress, and a few task-relevant future quantities, and those predictions drive advantage estimation, live failure detection, and candidate selection. The work mostly recombines existing RL ideas with engineering and optimization contributions that can be used together as one recipe or individually: AWR + RECAP combined for flow-matching VLA; an asynchronous distributed training / rollout pipeline through HuggingFace Hub; inference-time hyperparameters optimization via Thompson sampling; a sim-to-real recipe with camera-alignment tooling, heavy augmentation and DAgger-like HIL data collection.
2606.27163.paper_summary_zh: 我描述了我對LeHome Challenge 2026的解決方案，這是一個關於雙手衣物摺疊的ICRA 2026競賽。該系統在在線（模擬）回合中排名62支隊伍中的第1名，並在現實世界的決賽中獲得第2名。它通過強化學習循環改進了一個視覺-語言-行動（VLA）策略。該策略就是它自己的價值函數：同一個網絡不僅預測行動，還預測成功、進展以及一些與任務相關的未來量，這些預測驅動了優勢估計、實時失敗檢測和候選選擇。這項工作主要是將現有的強化學習理念與工程和優化貢獻重新組合，這些可以作為一個食譜一起使用或單獨使用：AWR + RECAP結合用於流匹配VLA；通過HuggingFace Hub的異步分佈式訓練/回滾管道；通過湯普森抽樣進行推理時的超參數優化；帶有相機對齊工具、強增強和類DAgger的HIL數據收集的模擬到現實食譜。
2606.27163.author: Ilia Larchenko et.al.
